'''Firkrann''' was an [[Iron Knight]], a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Shard (species)|Shard]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who utilized an [[FLTCH-series battle droid]] body as a host.

==Biography==
Firkrann was trained by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Aqinos]] without the approval of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. Like many other Iron Knights, Firkrann took a [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] [[Firkrann|name]] as his own, reflecting both his connection to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and his crystalline body. He was destroyed in a duel with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] in the fungi forests of [[Xagobah/Legends|Xagobah]].
